basics.name: Freddy Suarez
basics.label: Senior QA Automation Engineer / SDET
basics.summary: Senior SDET with 5+ years of experience building automation strategies for web, API, and cloud delivery teams. Specialized in Playwright, TypeScript, Java API testing, CI/CD quality gates, and AI-assisted QA workflows.

highlights: Led TypeScript and Playwright adoption for enterprise E2E automation.
Architected reusable framework patterns for fixtures, flows, reporting, and cross-browser execution.
Integrated automated checks into Harness pipelines across environments.
Mentored SDETs through code reviews, TypeScript practices, and automation strategy.
Developed API automation with Java, Cucumber, and Rest Assured for payment workflows.
Implemented TypeScript monitoring for critical endpoints.
Containerized automated test execution with Docker.
Enhanced reporting and notifications through Google Chat integrations.
Created custom UI automation frameworks with C#, Java, and Selenium WebDriver.
Built reusable test components to improve maintainability and accelerate coverage.
Supported multi-environment validation for banking software delivery.

projects.name: Agentic Testing CLI
projects.summary: AI-assisted Playwright test generation tool that explores pages, generates specs, executes them, repairs failures, and saves run history.

projects.name: QA Dashboard Portfolio
projects.summary: Static QA dashboard for presenting agentic testing flows, pipeline stages, metrics, and reporting roadmap.

certifications.name: ISTQB Certified Tester Advanced Level - Technical Test Analyst
